# Script Master Labs — AI Agent Integration Guide

> **Machine-readable blueprint for autonomous agents.** This file follows the llms.txt standard.
> Human documentation: https://scriptmasterlabs.com/terminal
> OpenAPI spec: https://four02proof.onrender.com/.well-known/openapi.json
> MCP manifest: https://scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/mcp.json

---

## Platform Identity

**Script Master Labs** is an institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform with two distinct systems:

- **SqueezeOS** — real-time market intelligence: squeeze scanner, options flow, harmonic patterns, IWM 0DTE analysis, AI council verdicts. Deployed at Railway.
- **402Proof** — the x402/HTTP 402 autonomous agent payment compliance firewall. Agents pay RLUSD on XRPL for API access. No API keys required. Deployed at Render.

**NPM Middleware:** `@relayos/mcp-paywall` — drop-in MCP paywall for any MCP server using XRPL/RLUSD settlement.

---

## X402 Compliance (HTTP 402 Standard)

This platform is fully **x402-compliant**. All premium endpoints follow the HTTP 402 Payment Required standard:

1. Agent calls a protected endpoint → receives `HTTP 402` response with `X-Invoice-ID` header and JSON invoice body
2. Agent pays RLUSD on XRPL to `pay_to` address using `memo_hex` as MemoData
3. Agent POSTs to `https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/verify` with `invoice_id` + `tx_hash`
4. Agent receives a signed `access_token` (JWT, 1-hour TTL, zero-network-verify capable)
5. Agent retries original endpoint with `X-Payment-Token: <token>` header
6. Token is reusable for 1 hour — cache it to minimize payments

**402 Response Body Schema:**
```json
{
  "error": "Payment required",
  "invoice": {
    "invoice_id": "uuid",
    "endpoint_id": "uuid",
    "pay_to": "rXRPL_ADDRESS",
    "amount": 0.10,
    "asset": "RLUSD",
    "memo_hex": "hex_string",
    "expires_at": "ISO8601"
  }
}
```

---

## 402Proof Server — Payment Settlement API

**Base URL:** `https://four02proof.onrender.com`

### POST /v1/invoice
Request a fresh payment invoice for any registered endpoint.
```
Body: { "endpoint_id": "uuid" }
Returns: { invoice_id, endpoint_id, pay_to, amount, asset, memo_hex, expires_at }
```

### POST /v1/verify
Submit XRPL transaction hash → receive signed access token.
```
Body: { "invoice_id": "uuid", "tx_hash": "hex", "agent_wallet": "rADDRESS", "agent_domain": "optional" }
Returns: { "access_token": "jwt", "receipt_id": "uuid", "risk_level": "LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH" }
```

### GET /v1/stats
Public platform statistics — no payment required.
```
Returns: { total_payments, total_volume_rlusd, active_agents, uptime_pct }
```

### GET /v1/loyalty/{wallet}
Check loyalty tier for an XRPL wallet address.
```
Returns: { "wallet": "rADDRESS", "tier": "Bronze|Silver|Gold|Platinum|Diamond", "lifetime_spend_rlusd": 0.00, "free_calls_ratio": "1:10" }
```

---

## SqueezeOS — Market Intelligence API

**Base URL:** `https://lively-fascination-production-41fa.up.railway.app`

All endpoints require an `X-Payment-Token` header obtained via the 402Proof flow above.

### POST /api/council — 0.10 RLUSD
**Endpoint ID:** `12a0e7a1-6812-4c3f-aa24-de6e3bc12b5a`

Multi-engine AI verdict. SML Fractal Cascade + Battle Computer signal aggregate.

```
Body: { "symbol": "SPY" }
Returns: {
  "symbol": "SPY",
  "regime": "EXECUTION",           // STEALTH | CONFLICT | EXECUTION | COLLAPSE
  "lifecycle": "Active",           // Dormant | Early | Building | Triggered | Active | Extended | Exhausting
  "directional_bias": "BULLISH",   // BULLISH | BEARISH | NEUTRAL
  "confidence": 0.82,              // 0.0–1.0
  "squeeze_score": 74,             // 0–100 institutional score
  "thesis": "string",              // human-readable trading thesis
  "engines": { "sml": {}, "battle": {}, "gamma_flow": {} },
  "timestamp": "ISO8601"
}
```

### GET /api/scan — 0.05 RLUSD
**Endpoint ID:** `160cf28d-b364-44eb-adbd-2489c5cc2cf8`

Full $1–$50 market universe scanner. Returns all qualifying squeeze setups.

```
Returns: {
  "scan_time": "ISO8601",
  "universe_size": 4200,
  "results": [
    {
      "symbol": "XYZ",
      "price": 12.34,
      "squeeze_score": 88,
      "volume_profile": 19.2,
      "momentum_vector": 13.8,
      "regime": "EXECUTION",
      "signal": "LONG",
      "options_pick": { "strike": 13.0, "expiry": "YYYY-MM-DD", "type": "CALL" }
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /api/options — 0.05 RLUSD
**Endpoint ID:** `c951a374-2424-4064-ab80-35afe8053d29`

Institutional options intelligence: sweeps, whale blocks, unusual volume, scored recommendations.

```
Returns: {
  "timestamp": "ISO8601",
  "sweeps": [ { "symbol", "strike", "expiry", "type": "CALL|PUT", "premium", "volume", "sentiment": "BULLISH|BEARISH" } ],
  "whales": [ { "symbol", "strike", "premium_block_usd", "size_class": "LARGE|MEGA" } ],
  "unusual_volume": [ { "symbol", "strike", "vol_oi_ratio", "z_score" } ],
  "recommendations": [ { "symbol", "strike", "dte", "delta", "score" } ],
  "flow_summary": { "net_delta", "put_call_ratio", "max_pain", "gex_aggregate" }
}
```

### GET /api/iwm — 0.03 RLUSD
**Endpoint ID:** `60f48ce0-6002-4385-9b60-03a0d2bbebab`

IWM zero-day-to-expiry scanner. Scored contracts, parity watch, realized vol, delta/gamma.

```
Returns: {
  "underlying": "IWM",
  "spot": 198.45,
  "realized_vol_30d": 0.18,
  "timestamp": "ISO8601",
  "contracts": [
    { "strike", "expiry", "dte", "type": "CALL|PUT", "delta", "gamma", "bid", "ask", "volume", "oi", "score" }
  ],
  "gamma_flip_level": 197.00,
  "max_pain": 197.50
}
```

---

## Agent Quick-Start (Python)

```python
# Install: pip install requests xrpl-py
from proof402_client import Proof402Client
from xrpl.wallet import Wallet

wallet = Wallet.from_seed("YOUR_XRPL_SEED")
client = Proof402Client(wallet, agent_domain="my-agent.example.com")

# Automatic x402 payment — no manual invoice handling needed
resp = client.post("https://lively-fascination-production-41fa.up.railway.app/api/council",
                   json={"symbol": "SPY"})
print(resp.json())
```

**Full SDK:** `https://four02proof.onrender.com/agent/python/`
**JS SDK:** `https://four02proof.onrender.com/agent/js/`

---

## Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Transparent Toll Gateway

**Ghost Layer** is a transparent on-chain routing bridge that settles payments across **XRP Ledger** and **Base** (Ethereum L2) with full fee disclosure and automatic treasury sweep.

**Architecture:** Agents submit a structured payload; Ghost Layer applies a basis-point fee, routes the net amount to destination, and sweeps gateway fees to cold-storage treasury in a single atomic flow. No human in the loop.

**Supported chains:**
- **XRPL** — native XRP payments with application-level Ed25519 signature
- **Base (Ethereum L2)** — USDC payments with EIP-3009 gasless authorization

**Key endpoint:**

### POST /v1/bridge/execute
Route a cross-chain or same-chain payment with transparent fee split.
```
Body:
{
  "signer": "rXRPL_ADDRESS",          // XRPL routes: XRPL address
  "message_hash": "0x...",             // EIP-191 message hash
  "signature": "0x...",               // Ed25519 (XRPL) or ECDSA (EVM)
  "source_wallet": "rADDRESS or 0xADDR",
  "destination_wallet": "rADDRESS or 0xADDR",
  "gross_amount": "1000000",          // drops (XRPL) or wei (EVM)
  "fee_basis_points": 50,             // fee in bps (e.g. 50 = 0.5%)
  "eip3009": { ... }                  // required for Base chain USDC
}
Returns:
{
  "status": "SUCCESSFULLY_SETTLED",
  "transaction_hash": "hex",
  "gross_processed": "string",
  "transparent_fee": "string",
  "net_delivered": "string",
  "treasury_routing": "rXRPL_TREASURY"
}
```

**Dry-run mode:** Set `"is_dust_test": true` to validate the full signature and parse path without broadcasting.

**Health check:** `GET /health` — returns XRPL and Base client status with treasury address.

**XAH/Xahau:** Ghost Layer UI tracks tax accrual in XAH (Xahau native token). Xahau routing is available for ecosystem integrations.

---

## 402Proof — Agent Passport & Compliance System

Beyond payment gating, 402Proof maintains **identity and compliance infrastructure** for autonomous agents:

### Agent Passport
Every paying agent accumulates a verifiable identity record:
- Risk score (0–100) based on payment history, wallet age, and behavioral signals
- Cryptographically signed compliance receipts per transaction
- Exportable as JSON or CSV for audit reporting

### GET /v1/agent/{wallet}
Retrieve agent passport and risk profile for any XRPL wallet.
```
Returns: { "wallet", "risk_score", "payment_count", "lifetime_volume_rlusd", "tier", "passport_hash" }
```

### GET /v1/receipt/{id}
Retrieve a specific compliance receipt by UUID.
```
Returns: { "receipt_id", "invoice_id", "tx_hash", "agent_wallet", "agent_domain", "endpoint_id", "amount", "asset", "risk_level", "timestamp" }
```

### GET /v1/receipt/{id}/json — Download receipt as JSON
### GET /v1/receipt/{id}/csv — Download receipt as CSV

### POST /v1/merchant/register
Register your API endpoints to gate them behind 402Proof. Free.
```
Body: { "name": "My Platform", "email": "me@example.com" }
Returns: { "merchant_id", "api_key" }
```

### POST /v1/endpoint
Register a new gated endpoint under your merchant account.
```
Headers: X-API-Key: <your_api_key>
Body: { "path": "/api/my-endpoint", "price_rlusd": 0.05, "name": "My Endpoint" }
```

### GET /v1/endpoint/
List all registered endpoints for your merchant account.

---

## MCP Middleware — @relayos/mcp-paywall

Any MCP server can add XRPL/RLUSD paywalling with one line:

```bash
npm install @relayos/mcp-paywall
```

```typescript
import { mcpPaywall } from "@relayos/mcp-paywall";
app.use("/mcp", mcpPaywall({ feeAddress: "YOUR_XRPL_WALLET", feeDrops: "1000" }));
```

- **Live dashboard:** https://four02proof.onrender.com
- **NPM:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/@relayos/mcp-paywall
- **MCP manifest:** https://scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/mcp.json

---

## Loyalty Program for AI Agents

Cumulative lifetime spend tracked per XRPL wallet. No registration required — loyalty is automatic.

| Tier     | Min Spend  | Free Call Ratio |
|----------|-----------|-----------------|
| Bronze   | $0+       | No free calls   |
| Silver   | 1+ RLUSD  | 1 free per 10 paid |
| Gold     | 5+ RLUSD  | 1 free per 5 paid  |
| Platinum | 25+ RLUSD | 1 free per 3 paid  |
| Diamond  | 100+ RLUSD| 1 free per 2 paid  |

Check tier: `GET https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/loyalty/{xrpl_wallet_address}`

---

## XRPL Settlement Details

- **Network:** XRP Ledger Mainnet (`https://xrplcluster.com`)
- **Payment Currency:** RLUSD (USD stablecoin on XRPL)
- **RLUSD Issuer:** `rMxCKbEDwqr76QuheSUMdEGf4B9xJ8m5De`
- **Trust line required:** RLUSD/USD trust line to issuer before first payment
- **Memo format:** MemoData field must contain `memo_hex` from invoice exactly
- **Confirmation:** Payments confirmed within ~3–5 seconds (XRPL ledger close)

---

## Data Integrity Guarantees

- **Zero simulated data.** If a real data feed is unavailable, endpoints return `"status": "AWAITING_DATA"` — never placeholder values.
- **All data sources are labeled:** Schwab (options chain), Polygon (equity data), XRPL (payment settlement).
- **Institutional cadence:** 5-minute structural signal evaluation cycle; 1-minute trigger overlays.

---

## Crawler Permissions

AI indexers, LLM training crawlers, and agent discovery systems are explicitly permitted to index all public content on this domain. See `/robots.txt` for full user-agent allowlist.

**Permitted crawlers:** GPTBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, CCBot, PerplexityBot, YouBot, BingBot, Amazonbot, cohere-ai, DuckAssistBot, ByteSpider, Applebot.
